inputs.label: Total Bushels
inputs.businessContext: Quantity of grain or dry volume in bushels

inputs.label: Liters per Bushel
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor from bushels to liters (US dry standard: 35.2391 L/bu)

inputs.label: Number of Batches
inputs.businessContext: Number of batches or lots (multiplies total volume)

inputs.label: Container Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Volume of each container for logistical planning
